title: Senior Flutter Developer
description:
We are seeking a talented Senior Flutter Developer to join our growing team. You will be responsible for developing and maintaining high-quality mobile and web applications using the Flutter framework.

As a key member of our engineering team, you will collaborate with designers, product managers, and other developers to deliver exceptional user experiences across platforms.
requirements: Strong knowledge of Dart programming language
Experience with state management (BLoC, Provider, Riverpod)

title: Backend Node.js Engineer
description:
We're looking for a skilled Backend Engineer to design and implement scalable server-side applications. You will build APIs, manage databases, and ensure our platform handles millions of requests reliably.

This role requires strong problem-solving skills and a passion for clean, efficient code.
requirements: Strong SQL and NoSQL database knowledge
